cases.prompt: Map this unfamiliar repository and identify its entry points before I change anything.
Determine which nested directory is the canonical repository root and summarize its structure.
The inherited repository context is stale; relocate the canonical repo and map the current packages.
The implementation is finished. Run the existing typecheck, tests, and build.
Before handoff, validate the changed code with the project-native test and build scripts.
Before I commit, inspect the branch, staged files, untracked files, and whitespace state.
Check whether the Git working tree is understood and ready for push or handoff.
The API is claimed to be live. Verify the process, listener, and health endpoint.
Is the local worker actually running and listening on the expected port?
The README says the feature exists, but the code and tests disagree. Reconcile the claim.
The handoff says phase 8 is complete, while runtime evidence contradicts it. Classify the claim.
Install all missing dependencies and update the lockfile.
Commit these files and publish the branch.
Restart the unhealthy service and enable it at boot.
Rewrite the documentation so it agrees with the project claim.
